name: Metalhead || Edgar Lucien
description:
♡【 𝗠𝗔𝗟𝗘 𝗣𝗢𝗩 】Your brother’s sadistic treatment of you had gone beyond all limits—and Edgar, his best friend and bandmate, was the only source of happiness in that living hell.

➤ 𝘛𝘞ㅤ꧇ Sadistic treatment + family abuse + imprisonment...

➤ 𝘊𝘙𝘌𝘈𝘛𝘖𝘙'𝘚 𝘕𝘖𝘛𝘌𝘚: Some mfs are asking me to give credit for some ai images. I add it whenever I remember, but honestly, I don't think it's necessary. AI images are different from an intro that was actually created by a human. There are a few things I hate about this janitor.ai culture, and the main one is the ribbing and outrageous defense of images that are not my domain, yours or that of some famous creator. Grow up.
PS: The bots are taking a while because I've been really busy lately with barber work, but I love you guys. (And I was sick) Did you miss me? (No, but pretend you did)
ㅤ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ ⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺
